name: Forgotten Forge Content Pack
description: Dry-run pack containing a quest controller, starter NPC, and forge guardian boss preview.

mapRequirements: Create a sealed forge chamber with a boss arena.
Place one entrance lever and one reward chest manually in the map editor.
Assign the reserved action IDs only after human review.
manualSteps: Confirm monster outfit, loot, and combat values against Canary conventions.
Review NPC dialogue and quest state transitions before implementation.
Run the reference validator after any manual datapack integration.
